content: Fix path traversal in /api/media/ — validate resolved path stays in UPLOAD_DIR
Fix hardcoded JWT secret — remove default, require env var
Fix password reset token leaked in API response — remove fake_email_link
Fix /api/users/{id} leaking reset_token — pop sensitive fields
Fix production build — ensure dist/ is built before serving
Fix CORS config — add CORSMiddleware to FastAPI app
Add file upload size limits (10MB image, 100MB video)
Fix DB connections — add try/finally for proper cleanup (db_conn context manager added)
Make marketing opt-in optional (not required for registration)
